data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of an 'Equipment check for classroom tech', but the evidence provided does not confirm that this requirement is met. The linked use case specifies the need for an equipment check, yet there is no evidence of such a check being performed or any related endpoints that confirm the functionality of the classroom tech. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding this specific requirement.
gaps: No evidence of an equipment check for classroom tech.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
